# TrailerInsurance.co.nz

> Trailer insurance comparison and lead generation service for New Zealand

TrailerInsurance.co.nz helps New Zealanders find and compare trailer insurance from leading NZ providers. We connect users with ICNZ-registered insurance brokers who provide personalised quotes and advice.

## Coverage Types
- Comprehensive Cover: Full protection against damage, theft, fire, storms
- Third-Party Liability: Cover up to $20M for damage caused by your trailer
- Agreed Value vs Market Value: Fixed payout or current market value options
- Commercial / Carriers Liability: Business trailer and heavy transport cover
- Contents & Accessory Cover: Protection for items stored in caravans/trailers
- Towing & Storage: Recovery and storage costs after accidents

## NZ Regulatory Bodies
- ICNZ (Insurance Council of New Zealand): https://www.icnz.org.nz/
- FMA (Financial Markets Authority): https://www.fma.govt.nz/
- IFSO (Insurance & Financial Services Ombudsman): https://www.ifso.nz/
- RBNZ Insurance Regulation: https://www.rbnz.govt.nz/regulation-and-supervision/insurers
- Citizens Advice Bureau: https://www.cab.org.nz/
